honest_audit.borderline_notes: Per-input mask-anneal at inference is a novel packaging; per-input temperature anneal at inference (Adaptive Inference-Time Compute 2410.02725) is functionally adjacent at judge 0.78. The mask leg (per-input token-mask schedule) is not in surveyed prior art, but the candidate's claim hinges on the joint mask+temperature schedule and 2410.02725 covers the temperature leg under risk-like signals.
